on_interested_reply.step_1: Write reply to data/new_replies.json immediately. Timestamp it.
on_interested_reply.step_2: Classify in data/reply_classifications.json as INTERESTED with reasoning.
on_interested_reply.step_3: Prepare bespoke proposal within 24 hours — match scope to their specific signal (SSL, mobile, no-website, AIDA).
on_interested_reply.step_4: Send proposal. Log CHANGELOG same session — mandatory.
on_interested_reply.step_5: Activate LinkedIn Day 3-7 protocol. Hard deadline: Tuesday 2026-05-19 (Day 7). Execute Friday or Monday.
on_interested_reply.step_7: Update value_delivery_queue.json with new item for this lead.

ssl_trades.option_b: SSL + mobile fix — £150-200 one-off (recommended for most Ryedale trades)
ssl_trades.option_c: SSL + mobile + local SEO optimisation — £300-350 one-off
ssl_trades.note: Match option to their signal and business size. Ryedale rural trades — Option B is usually the right entry point.

no_website_rural.option_b: 5-page site with contact form + Google Business Profile setup — £500 one-off
no_website_rural.option_c: Option B + monthly local SEO — £550 one-off + £75/month
no_website_rural.note: For rural Ryedale with 20+ reviews but no site — Option B is usually the right pitch. Reference the Google Maps listing they already have as social proof.

aida_high_review.note: AIDA leads (4.5★+ 100+ reviews) — keyword-gap fix. Quote for on-page SEO work. £150-250 depending on scope.
aida_high_review.option_a: On-page SEO — title tags, meta, Google Business Profile optimisation — £150-200 one-off
aida_high_review.option_b: Option A + one month of local citation building — £250 one-off

proposal_copy_rules.personalisation: Reference their exact signal and exact URL/issue from Day-0 email. Do not use a generic proposal template.
proposal_copy_rules.framing: Small job, fast turnaround, local specialist. Not 'digital marketing agency'.
proposal_copy_rules.options: Always give 2-3 options — let them pick up-front. Avoids back-and-forth.
proposal_copy_rules.price_anchoring: Lead with the middle option (Option B) as recommended. Mention Option A as the quick-fix minimum. Option C as the full-service upsell.
proposal_copy_rules.proof: Reference the 3 INTERESTED leads from Batches 1-4 if useful — 'I've done this for other Yorkshire businesses.' Do not name them.
proposal_copy_rules.call_to_action: Offer a 15-minute call to talk through options. Not a discovery call. Not a consultation. 15 minutes.

linkedin_batch5_protocol.mandatory: linkedin_profiles.json MUST be written same session as LinkedIn execution — no exceptions
linkedin_batch5_protocol.lesson_from_warm_pipeline: LinkedIn not executed in 47 sessions cost £800-1,175. This does not repeat. Hard deadline is real.

lessons_applied_to_batch_5.proposal_sla: 24 hours — non-negotiable. Ripon Road Carpentry (Tom) asked for pricing and never got it. That does not repeat.
lessons_applied_to_batch_5.profiles_json_mandatory: linkedin_profiles.json written same session as LinkedIn execution — no exceptions.
lessons_applied_to_batch_5.single_pain_point: One signal per proposal option. Rob's redesign ask came from a single clear mobile/SSL signal.
lessons_applied_to_batch_5.options_not_quotes: Present 3 options, not a single quote. Reduces friction. Let them self-select.
